TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O kapolongan sowal 'i, o Ikiris, nikawrira, caay ka lalen sa malecad to no Ikiris sowal, sa pangangan han to Awto Ikiris a Sowal . Aloman ko nai cowacoway mafolaway a tayni tona kitakit, oya teloc to nona mafolaway 'i, i loma no niyah o kasofocan kitakit a sowal ko kahasasowal, patinako han, o somowalay to congko a sowal nahaop ko 2.1%,Itariya sowal 1.6%, ira ho ko romaroma o caay ka hakowa ko tamdaw asowal.
S.PHON: o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan so~uwaɾ ʡi, o~u ikiris, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka ɾaɾən sa maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ikiris so~uwaɾ, sa paŋaŋan ħan to~u awto~u ikiris a so~uwaɾ . aɾo~uman ko~u nai ʦo~uwaʦo~uwaj mafo~uɾawaj a tajni to~una kitakit, o~uja təɾo~uʦ to~u no~una mafo~uɾawaj ʡi, i ɾo~uma no~u nijaħ o~u kaso~ufo~uʦan kitakit a so~uwaɾ ko~u kaħasaso~uwaɾ, patinako~u ħan, o~u so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u ʦo~uŋko~u a so~uwaɾ naħao~up ko~u *.*%,itarija so~uwaɾ *.*%, ira ħo~u ko~u ro~umaro~uma o~u ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw aso~uwaɾ.
S.FORM: O kapolongan sowal 'i, o Ikiris, nikawrira, caay ka lalen sa malecad to no Ikiris sowal, sa pangangan han to Awto Ikiris a Sowal . Aloman ko nai cowacoway mafolaway a tayni tona kitakit, oya teloc to nona mafolaway 'i, i loma no niyah o kasofocan kitakit a sowal ko kahasasowal, patinako han, o somowalay to congko a sowal nahaop ko 2.1%,Itariya sowal 1.6%, ira ho ko romaroma o caay ka hakowa ko tamdaw asowal.
S.PHON: o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan so~uwaɾ ʡi, o~u ikiris, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka ɾaɾən sa maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ikiris so~uwaɾ, sa paŋaŋan ħan to~u awto~u ikiris a so~uwaɾ . aɾo~uman ko~u nai ʦo~uwaʦo~uwaj mafo~uɾawaj a tajni to~una kitakit, o~uja təɾo~uʦ to~u no~una mafo~uɾawaj ʡi, i ɾo~uma no~u nijaħ o~u kaso~ufo~uʦan kitakit a so~uwaɾ ko~u kaħasaso~uwaɾ, patinako~u ħan, o~u so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u ʦo~uŋko~u a so~uwaɾ naħao~up ko~u *.*%,itarija so~uwaɾ *.*%, ira ħo~u ko~u ro~umaro~uma o~u ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw aso~uwaɾ.
